title: Tangy Mediterranean Semolina Fritters
description: Crispy semolina fritters infused with the flavors of the Mediterranean, perfect as a snack or appetizer.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine semolina flour and water. Mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until smooth.
Shape each portion into a ball and flatten slightly into a disk shape.
Heat olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
When the oil is hot, add 2-3 fritters to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Serve warm with your favorite dipping sauce.
